name: material-symbols
title: Material Symbols
description: Search Material Symbols and Lucide icons and copy or paste them as SVG or image
author: takeshi_matsue

commands.name: search-symbols
commands.title: Search Icons
commands.subtitle: Material Symbols & Lucide
commands.description: Search icons and copy or paste them as SVG or image

preferences.name: primaryAction
preferences.title: Primary Action
preferences.description: Action triggered by the Enter key

preferences.name: style
preferences.title: Default Style
preferences.description: Default style on launch (switchable from the search bar dropdown)

preferences.name: fill
preferences.title: Fill
preferences.label: Use the filled variant (FILL 1) by default
preferences.description: Toggle at runtime with ⌘F (Material Symbols only)

preferences.name: weight
preferences.title: Weight
preferences.description: Default stroke weight (adjust at runtime with ⌘] / ⌘[)

preferences.name: color
preferences.title: SVG Color
preferences.description: Color for the copied/pasted SVG (e.g. #0081E8, currentColor)

preferences.name: size
preferences.title: SVG Size (px)
preferences.description: width / height of the copied/pasted SVG

preferences.name: columns
preferences.title: Grid Columns
preferences.description: Number of columns in the grid (3–8)
